name: Tofu and Sauteed Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tofu into bite-sized pieces (5 x 25 x 25 mm makes a nice presentation). You can also cube the tofu if serving in a large dish. Dip the tofu in flour.
2. Heat a saute pan with oil. Saute the tofu on all sides until golden brown. Remove from the pan and place on a serving dish.
3. Add garlic and black bean paste to the pan and saute for 1 minute. Then add the vegetables and saute for an additional 2 minutes. Remove the vegetables, leaving the liquid behind, and arrange them on the serving dish with the tofu.
4. Add chicken stock and soy sauce to the pan and reduce by half. Pour the reduced stock over the tofu and vegetables, and sprinkle with freshly chopped green onions.
